extortion.description: [AI generated] Chanel is a renowned French luxury fashion house founded by designer Coco Chanel in 1910. Specializing in women's haute couture, ready-to-wear clothes, luxury goods, and fashion accessories, Chanel has a significant influence in the world of fashion. In addition to its clothing line, Chanel also produces fragrances, most notably No. 5, and high-end cosmetic products. The company's logo, two interlocked C's, is globally recognizable.
